identity.target_document: https://github.com/menno420/venture-lab/blob/79a1987f0cb89a801c1a30d02a692aaf3a44ae6a/docs/publishing/PUBLISHING-PLAN.md (§4 'KDP Select: Yes' OWNER-ACTION rows + every verified royalty/word-count constant, all @ 79a1987; venture-lab walled this session — 'Access denied: repository menno420/venture-lab is not configured' — so the rows are pinned here via the block, which quotes them @ 79a1987)
identity.claim: idea-engine PR #321 → main 3f1c955 (claim-first ritual; number RESERVES, never the position — P037 → V048 rides sim-lab PR #99, untouched)
identity.title: KU-exclusivity fork — does the plan's blanket 'KDP Select: Yes' survive its own royalty arithmetic?

frame.statement: Each of a title's reader-contacts is a would-be BORROWER w.p. beta = b/(1+b) — a KU subscriber who borrows when the title is enrolled — else a would-be BUYER. Both arms are priced at the SAME p per cell: the exclusivity fork isolated from the pricing fork. Per-contact revenue comparison, never absolute earnings (the plan's §6 'base case ≈ $0' forecast discipline and Q-0259 r.4 untouched).
frame.arm_KU: per-contact revenue = (1-beta)*((1-kappa)*roy(p) + kappa*rate*KENP*rt) + beta*rate*KENP*rt  — would-be buyers cannibalize to a borrow w.p. kappa
frame.arm_WIDE: per-contact revenue = (1-beta)*roy(p) + beta*gamma*roy(p)  — the title is NOT enrolled; would-be borrowers buy anyway w.p. gamma
frame.decision_quantities: per-cell sign of Delta(cell) = KU - WIDE and the KU-win share W = #{Delta > 0}/288
frame.model_basis: gamma and kappa are invented, pinned, the disclosed weakest joints — NO fleet datapoint on borrow-vs-buy behavior exists, zero titles published; the sweeps bracket scale, not shape; reader-contacts held EQUAL across arms by construction (KU visibility boost and wide multi-store reach BOTH out of scope — the metric prices royalty mechanics, not discoverability); KENP rate is Amazon-set and monthly-varying (grid brackets the historically cited range); words-per-KENP is Amazon-computed per book, pinned here; fractional-page payout is a stated simplification; static single-title single-90-day-term economics (series spillover, term renewal, mid-term price switching out of scope)

kenp_rule: KENP = round(words / words_per_kenp); at the pinned 190: round(27865/190) = round(146.657...) = 147, round(36434/190) = round(191.757...) = 192

royalty.rule: roy(p) = 7/10*p - 15/100 for 2.99 <= p <= 9.99 (the per-MB delivery fee at a pinned flat 1 MB ebook, inside the 15/100) else 35/100*p
royalty.anchor_note: roy($0.99) = $0.3465 / roy($2.99) = $1.943 / roy($4.99) = $3.343 / roy($6.99) = $4.743 — pinned Fractions, gate-checked before any run

grids.grid_note: 2 titles × 4 b × 3 rt × 3 rate × 4 price tiers = 288 decision cells; the plan's own Tier-1 novella price $4.99 flagged as THE default 72-cell slice
grids.loop_order: cells lexicographic: title, b, rt, rate, p (pinned); per cell arm order KU then WIDE (runner pin, disclosed)

pinned_constants.sensitivity_note: all four pairs REPORTING-ONLY — they cannot flip the decision; file-size enters the 70%-band royalty as roy(p) = 7/10*p - 15/100*size_mb

arm_S.read_through_draw: per-borrower read-through ~ Uniform(rt - 3/20, rt + 3/20) — mean exactly rt at every swept rt; fractional-page payout a disclosed simplification
arm_S.seed_registry_note: allocated strictly above the P037-registered high-water 20261288 (sim-lab committed high-water 20261284 @ 4173377; V047 zero-seed per its own card); NEW REGISTRY HIGH-WATER: 20261292; aux 20261292 registered, never drawn by any leg (reserved)
arm_S.draws_note: runner pin, disclosed: every KU contact consumes exactly 3 random() draws (type, cannibalize, read-through — drawn unconditionally so sentinel counts are exact) and every WIDE contact exactly 2 (type, buy-anyway); per-leg draw-count sentinels assert the exact totals

agreement_gate.rule: per-cell |KU_S - KU_A| <= tol(cell, arm, M_leg) and |WIDE_S - WIDE_A| <= tol(cell, arm, M_leg), main and stability legs; run INVALID on any failure
agreement_gate.tolerance_rule: tol(cell, arm, M) = z_familywise * sigma(cell, arm) / sqrt(M), sigma the EXACT closed-form per-contact revenue standard deviation derived from the same Fractions as Arm A
agreement_gate.precheck: z_familywise >= 2.5 asserted, and every tolerance computed and pinned, BEFORE any RNG draw (the P029/P030 design rule: tolerances >= 2.5*sigma of the registered-M estimators, pre-checked); familywise: 2*288 comparisons/leg × 2 seeded decision legs + the reporting spot-leg, z=5 puts the familywise false-fail odds ~1e-3
agreement_gate.variance_closed_forms: KU: E[X] = (1-beta)*((1-kappa)*roy + kappa*rate*KENP*rt) + beta*rate*KENP*rt; E[X^2] = ((1-beta)*kappa + beta)*(rate*KENP)^2*(rt^2 + 3/400) + (1-beta)*(1-kappa)*roy^2  (Uniform(rt-3/20, rt+3/20) has E[U^2] = rt^2 + 3/400); WIDE: E[X] = (1-beta+beta*gamma)*roy; E[X^2] = (1-beta+beta*gamma)*roy^2; Var = E[X^2] - E[X]^2

control_legs.kappa0_gamma0: exact-identity leg (Arm A Fractions, all 288 cells): with kappa=0 and gamma=0, Delta = beta*rate*KENP*rt EXACTLY and KU wins every cell
control_legs.rate0_kappa0_gamma0: exact-identity leg (Arm A Fractions, all 288 cells): with rate=0, kappa=0, gamma=0, the arms are identical — Delta == 0 on every cell

monotonicity_audits.delta_in_rate: Delta nondecreasing in rate per cell (all other coordinates fixed)
monotonicity_audits.delta_in_rt: Delta nondecreasing in rt per cell (all other coordinates fixed)
monotonicity_audits.W_in_gamma: W nonincreasing in gamma across its sensitivity pair: W(1/20) >= W(3/20) >= W(3/10)

other_gates: royalty-band anchor identities as pinned Fractions (see royalty.anchor_identities) checked before any run
per-leg draw-count sentinels (exact totals from draws_per_contact × contacts per leg; control/reporting-exact legs draw ZERO)
TWIN independently-written decision evaluators (Fraction-comparison logic vs integer-arithmetic logic) must agree on the main table AND both seeded legs' reproductions
stdout + results.json byte-identical across TWO full process runs, verified by EXTERNAL diff
CPython minor version pinned and asserted: 3.11

seed-20261290 half-M stability leg must reproduce the RULING (same class as the exact Arm A decision); the seed-20261289 main MC leg must also reproduce it (runner pin, stricter than registered, disclosed)

decision_rules.W_source: the decision W is Arm A's EXACT count #{Delta > 0} over the 288 cells (zero sampling error); Arm S main + stability legs must reproduce the resulting class from their own per-cell Delta signs (stability-reproduced)

REJECT.label: the convention default fails its own arithmetic — strike the blanket 'KDP Select: Yes' §4 rows
REJECT.rule: W < 2/5 of the 288 cells, stability-reproduced; checked FIRST — the costly error is an unmeasured 90-day exclusivity default executing on owner clicks, so the protect-against-lock-in arm cannot be shadowed

APPROVE.label: ratify the default with its evidence row
APPROVE.rule: W >= 4/5 of all 288 cells AND KU wins >= 4/5 of the 72 cells at the plan's own $4.99 tier, stability-reproduced

NULL.label: anything else — the flip axes named via per-axis win shares and the b* crossover map; the conditional rule is the citable finding
NULL.expected_flip_axes: the PRICE-TIER axis (KU pays where the 35% band makes sales cheap, never at $6.99) and the BORROW-TO-SALE ratio b (the demand-mixture axis only a live measurement can pin)

decision_rules.drafting_liveness: drafting arithmetic, disclosed, NOT decision-binding — the rules decide, not the prediction: closed form gives W = 101/288 ≈ 0.351 overall, 4/72 ≈ 0.056 at the $4.99 tier, 72/72 at the $0.99 35%-band tier, per-b shares 19/72 → 32/72 rising in b — REJECT the expected landing, APPROVE and NULL both reachable under the pinned grid

consequences_preregistered.APPROVE: the §4 'KDP Select: Yes' rows get their evidence row (ratified with the pinned table), routed lane-side via the manager sweep, Q-0260 — this repo never edits venture-lab files, and enrollment stays an OWNER action per the lane's hard rails
consequences_preregistered.REJECT: the blanket 'Yes' is struck from the recommendation posture — enrollment becomes a per-title decision gated on the verdict's crossover table, the quantified reason riding the manager sweep to the §4 rows, vetting packets, and OWNER-QUEUE before any enrollment click
consequences_preregistered.NULL: the conditional rule ships and the cheapest LIVE probe is named: 90 days of KDP dashboard data on ONE enrolled title (orders vs KENP pages read on the same dashboard → the real b and the real rate*KENP*rt per borrow at zero new tooling), locating the catalog's actual cell before the default is re-litigated

reporting_only.note: seed 20261291; these legs CANNOT flip the decision
legs: gamma sensitivity sweep {1/20, 3/10} — full 288-cell W recomputed, Arm A exact
kappa sensitivity sweep {1/10, 7/20} — full 288-cell W recomputed, Arm A exact
words-per-KENP sensitivity sweep {150, 230} — KENP re-derived by the kenp_rule, full 288-cell W recomputed, Arm A exact
file-size sensitivity sweep {1/2, 5/2} MB — 70%-band royalty re-derived, full 288-cell W recomputed, Arm A exact
per-(title, rt, rate, p) crossover b* table — the smallest swept b at which KU wins, 72 rows, Arm A exact
Delta_rel = KU/WIDE - 1 distributions (overall + per price tier quartiles), Arm A exact
per-axis win shares over {title, b, rt, rate, p}, Arm A exact

seeded MC spot-replication (seed 20261291, M = 50000) of the kappa and gamma sensitivity ENDPOINTS on the affected arm over the 72-cell $4.99 tier, agreement-checked at the same tolerance rule — a runner design choice (scope: the flagged default slice), disclosed; gives the reporting seed real draws and its own sentinel

runtime.hermetic: stdlib-only; the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json; zero repo/network reads; one command, no flags
